metadata.name: Generate a List of Top-Selling Products

description: A marketing manager needs a report of the top 10 best-selling products from the last quarter to plan a new campaign.

nodes.task_description: Query the sales database for all orders placed in the last quarter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves all relevant sales data.

nodes.task_description: Aggregate the data to count the total units sold for each product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the sales volume per SKU.

nodes.task_description: Sort the products by units sold in descending order and return the top 10.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates an accurate report of the top 10 best-sellers.
